scripts.dev: docker compose up -d && docker compose logs -f api frontend
scripts.storybook: docker compose up -d storybook && docker compose logs -f storybook
scripts.storybook:build: docker compose exec storybook npm run storybook:build
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:api: docker compose exec api npm run build
scripts.build:frontend: docker compose exec frontend npx ng build --configuration=production
scripts.docker:rebuild: docker compose down && docker compose build --no-cache && docker compose up -d
scripts.prisma:generate: docker compose exec api npx prisma generate
scripts.prisma:migrate: docker compose exec api npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:migrate:prod: docker compose exec api npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.prisma:studio: docker compose exec api npx prisma studio
scripts.prisma:seed: docker compose exec api npx prisma db seed
scripts.prisma:seed:admin: docker compose exec api npx ts-node prisma/seed-admin.ts
scripts.prisma:reset: docker compose exec api npx prisma migrate reset
scripts.db:backup: docker compose exec db pg_dump -U ${DB_USER:-cusco} ${DB_NAME:-cusco} > backups/$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).sql
scripts.lint: npm run lint:api && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.lint:api: docker compose exec api npm run lint
scripts.lint:frontend: docker compose exec frontend npx ng lint
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix:api && npm run lint:fix:frontend
scripts.lint:fix:api: docker compose exec api npm run lint -- --fix
scripts.lint:fix:frontend: docker compose exec frontend npx ng lint --fix
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:api: docker compose exec api npm run test
scripts.test:frontend: docker compose exec frontend npx ng test --watch=false
scripts.test:e2e: docker compose exec api npm run test:e2e
